resources.string: Download or remove reading fonts with large file sizes.
Show the highlight menu when you select a passage of text.
Not available. Reduce font size to enable setting.
Lock content in the current screen orientation. Turn off to use system orientation.
Not Available. Turn off Continuous Scroll to enable setting.
Use a page turn animation while reading.
While reading, tap the bottom left of the page to rotate through your selected displays for reading progress.
Choose how to display your progress while reading.
Update this theme with custom settings
Edit the name of the theme
Save your settings as a theme
"Use your phone's volume buttons to turn pages."
Display the current time on the page.
"When we're unsure of the correct hint for a word, we'll show you a list of possible meanings and ask you to pick the one that is most helpful."
Done. Cancels and unselects all notifications.
Kindle cancel audio download button. Double tap to cancel audio download for %s
Double tap and hold to select this notification.
Double tap and hold to unselect this notification.
Double tap to activate. Double tap and hold to select and delete this notification.
Showing tool bar with delete button. Navigate up to delete selected notifications.
Tool bar with delete button is hidden.
Double tap and hold to select and delete this notification.
%s failed to download. Double tap to retry.
%1$s is downloading. %2$d percent complete. Double tap to cancel.
%s is not downloaded. Double tap to download.
%s is queued for download. Double tap to cancel.
Sleep timer set. Audio will pause in %s
Sleep timer set. Playback will pause at end of chapter
"By continuing, you agree to the "Kindle Terms of Service.
Automatically use data from this device to provide features through Whispersync for Books.

"Whispersync for Books uses data from this device to keep your Kindle apps in sync, back up your annotations, and provide other features. If you turn off Whispersync for this device, this device will not send such usage data to Amazon's servers, and some features will be unavailable to you, including syncing your reading location from this device across other devices."
Something went wrong. Please grant access to a folder on your device.
This issue may be removed as new issues are delivered.
This issue will remain on your Kindle.
Your Notes and Marks might not be saved because there is not enough storage space on your Kindle. Free up space on your device by removing content you no longer use.
This note will be deleted across all your devices.
Get new release updates, improved recommendations, and more coming soon.
Follow the author to get new release updates, improved recommendations, and more coming soon.
Moving this book will remove it from its current custom shelf. Are you sure you want to remove this?
It looks like you’re offline. Keep this on to update your reading activity on Goodreads when you go back online.
Removing a book deletes all activity for that book (likes, comments, ratings, reviews, quotes, etc.) from your Goodreads profile
An error occurred while updating your Goodreads profile. Please try again or visit the Goodreads website or app to make this change.
An error occurred earlier while updating your Goodreads profile for this book. Please try to update your profile again.
An error occurred while updating your Goodreads profile. Please link to your Goodreads account in Kindle Settings.
An error occurred while updating your Goodreads profile. Please visit the Goodreads website to link your account.

Kindle for Android software © 2010–%d Amazon.com, Inc. or its affiliates. All rights reserved. Amazon, the Amazon logo, the AmazonKindle logo, Kindle, and Whispersync are trademarks of Amazon.com, Inc. or its affiliates.
Add a shortcut to return to the Kindle Home Screen.
Add a shortcut to see your Kindle library.
Add a shortcut to your most recently read book.
Add a shortcut to shop the Kindle store.
Professional narration is not available on this page. Go to the next narrated location or continue without narration.
If you would like to cancel your professional narration order, please contact Customer Care on 1800 736-910 (Australia Toll Free) or +61 3 9034 3784 (International).
If you would like to cancel your professional narration order, please contact Customer Care on 0800 58900 73 (DE free phone) or +49 (0) 89 22061058 (International).
If you would like to cancel your professional narration order, please contact Customer Care on 0800 496 2455 (UK Free phone) or + 44 (0) 203 356 6218 (International).
If you would like to cancel your professional narration order, please contact Customer Care at 1-888-283-5051 (USA & Canada) or 1-973-820-0400 (International).
There was an error with your purchase. [[Try again]] or check your network and billing settings.
"Your order is taking longer than usual to process. If you don't see your title shortly, please contact Customer Care on 1800 736-910 (Australia Toll Free) or +61 3 9034 3784 (International)."
"Your order is taking longer than usual to process. If you don't see your title shortly, please contact Customer Care on 0800 58900 73 (DE free phone) or +49 (0) 89 22061058 (International)."
"Your order is taking longer than usual to process. If you don't see your title shortly, please contact Customer Care on 0800 496 2455 (UK Free phone) or + 44 (0) 203 356 6218 (International)."
"Your order is taking longer than usual to process. If you don't see your title shortly, please contact Customer Care at 1-888-283-5051 (USA & Canada) or 1-973-820-0400 (International)."
Thank you for adding professional narration. Sit back and enjoy the experience!
Make this book come alive with narration. Switch between reading and listening without ever losing your place.
To enable manual adjustment of display brightness, go to Display & Sound in Settings and turn off Auto-Brightness.
Download the Audible companions you own automatically when you download the paired book.
Automatically show the highlight menu when you select a passage of text.
section index,adjustable,double tap to adjust the value
The item you were reading is no longer available on your device.
The item you were reading, %s, is no longer available on your device.
If you disable this, you will no longer receive updates to your books automatically.
Please enable to receive book updates automatically.
Set your automatic book updates preference
Enable automatic updates for your books
Please turn on Whispersync to enable automatic book updates.
You have no bookmarks. Tap the top right corner of any page to create a bookmark.
Bookmark Book Text Failed to Load
Sorry, we were unable to retrieve the details for this book. Please try again later.
An unexpected error has occurred. Please try again. If the problem persists, please contact Amazon Customer Service at www.amazon.cn/devicesupport.
Unable to complete your request at this time. Please try again later. If the problem continues, you can email us via the Send Feedback option in the Settings menu.
Great! Now, pick some genres you like:
We recommend you rate at least %1$d books.
Now, rate some books in those genres.
Thanks. Here are some free book samples to get you started reading.
Checked samples will download to your device
Checked books and samples will download to your device
"You've picked 10 books. Tap 'Done' to start reading."
Welcome to Kindle Unlimited! Here are some of the top books in the genres you picked. Choose up to 10 books and start reading.
You can choose 10 Kindle Unlimited books at a time. To choose a new book, unselect a previously selected book and select a new one.

By signing up, you agree to the Kindle Unlimited Terms and authorize us to charge your default payment method or another payment method on file after any applicable free trial. Your Kindle Unlimited membership continues until canceled. If you do not wish to continue for $9.99/month + any taxes, you may cancel anytime at www.amazon.com/kucentral.
In the genres you picked, Kindle Unlimited offers free unlimited reading and listening from over 1 Million books, magazines and more.
Enjoy 30 days free. Only $9.99/month after your trial. Cancel anytime.
Want more than samples? You can still start your free trial of Kindle Unlimited and read these books today.
You can now enjoy unlimited books and audiobooks on any device.
Please check your Wi-Fi or mobile network connection and try again.

"In a few easy steps, we’ll help you get personalized recommendations and find your first book.
As a Prime member, you also get free, unlimited access to over a thousand books, magazines and more with Prime Reading."
You can choose 10 Prime Reading books at a time. To choose a new book, unselect a previously selected book and select a new one.
Thanks! Here are some top books in Prime Reading from the genres you picked. Choose up to 10 books and start reading.
You can rate more books on the previous page to receive recommendations.
Books you marked as Want to Read
"You've rated fewer than 10 books. The more books you rate, the better your recommendations will be."
Redeem Tokens to unlock Kindle Vella episodes. The number of Tokens required to unlock an episode varies based on episode length.
To continue reading, you must be connected to the internet.
Please check your WiFi or cellular data network.
Here are a few popular titles to get you started.
If you change your mind, go to Settings and tap Notifications
Tap to read Kindle and enjoy Samsung Book Deals
You are in collections view. Tap the sort menu to switch to grid or list view.
Your Facebook password has changed. Please log into this app again to reconnect your Facebook account.
This app doesn’t have permission to do this. To change permissions, try logging into the app again.
Please log into this app again to reconnect your Facebook account.
Please log into this app again to reconnect your Facebook account.
Your Facebook account is locked. Please log into www.facebook.com to continue.
"New! You're in control - choose what info you want to share with apps."
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Are you sure you want to exit the application ?
This permission allows other applications to view your Kindle library and perform actions on it, such as downloading or archiving books.
This permission allows other applications to query the Kindle application for content.
Your selection exceeds the copy limit set by the publisher of this book.
Could not write to external storage.
Link, double-tap to view more about the book.
Enable Audible Immersive Reading in Continuous Scroll feature
Enable Audible Matchmaker/Upgrader webview on FOS
Please enter custom endpoint in the format of the full url, including http.
Please press the back button to go back to the Kindle app for the change to take effect.
Audible Store Web Endpoint: (Please use the custom endpoint for non US marketplaces!)
Dictionaries are not yet available for Arabic.
Dictionaries are not yet available for Gujarati.
Dictionaries are not yet available for Hindi.
Dictionaries are not yet available for Malayalam.
There are no dictionaries available for Marathi.
Dictionaries are not yet available for Tamil.
Dictionaries are not yet available for Traditional Chinese.
Deleting a collection will not remove the books and other content contained within the collection.
This title will be deleted from your library on all of your devices. If you wish to read this item again, it will need to be repurchased. You can still listen to your audiobook in the Audible app.
This title will be removed from your library on all of your devices. Your notes and highlights will be saved if you add this book to your library in the future.
These titles will be removed from your library on all of your devices. Your notes and highlights will be saved if you add these books to your library in the future.
These samples will be removed from your library on all of your devices.
This will remove the selected item from your library on all of your devices.
This title will be deleted from your library on all of your devices. If you wish to read this item again, it will need to be repurchased.
This sample will be removed from your library on all of your devices.
There Was An Error Processing Your Request
Unable to complete your request at this time. Please try again later. If the problem continues, try restarting the application.
Deleting this item will remove it from all your devices.
Deleting these items will remove them from all your devices.
Deleting a sample will remove it from all your devices.
More menu is disabled in demo mode.
You need to be in custom sort mode to rearrange this collection. Switch to custom sort?
Your text selection exceeds the sharing limit for this book.
Only books currently in your library can be shared. Sorry!
Unable to complete share. Please try again.
Please check your Wi-Fi or mobile network connection and try again.
"The dictionary can't be opened. Would you like to remove and re-download it?"
Download error. Would you like to download it again?
Download failed: Connection not found, please check your wireless settings.
Definitions will appear here when the download is complete.
This dictionary is not available in your locale.
To display definitions, download the free dictionary.
"In order to view this file, grant Kindle permission to open files from the '%s' folder on your device."
"Please grant access to the '%s' folder to view the document. To grant access, click on the file and then click 'Allow'."
If you disable access, files from this folder will no longer appear in the library. You may re-enable access at any time in the future to see files from this folder again.
"Are you sure you want to disable access to '%s'?"
You can turn off Popular Highlights by going to the library settings menu
Please check your network connection and try again
All the books in this collection will be downloaded.
There was an issue while downloading
Audio download encountered an error for \"%1$s\"
"Download failure. Please exit magazine and retry download."
We do not currently support Word Runner with continuous scrolling. Switch to the paginated view to use it.
You read %1$s in %2$s and %3$s at %4$d wpm.
Content not supported. Closing Word Runner.

Word Runner" is a fun new way to read faster. It keeps your eyes focused on the center of the page and brings each word right to where your eyes already are.
With "Dynamic Pacing", Word Runner slows down automatically for difficult words, punctuation and paragraph breaks. And when you first start reading, it gradually builds up to the speed you choose.
If you miss something, just press and hold the screen to activate the "Brake". It instantly pauses Word Runner, and lets you easily scroll back and pick up wherever you like.
Give it a try… and see how fast you can read!"
Read faster, one word at a time
"You can change your Kindle's device name."
Go to the Kindle Store to find a book and start reading.
Select an Email App to send:

"Hi - I think you should check out this book, \"%1$s\" by %2$s.
Start reading it for free: %3$s
--------------
Read on the go for free – download Kindle for Android, iOS, PC, Mac and more %4$s"

"Check out this Kindle Vella Story \"%1$s\" by %2$s
Learn more: %3$s
--------------
Read on the go for free – download Kindle for Android, iOS, PC, Mac and more %4$s"
Check out this Kindle Vella Story – \"%1$s\"

"Hi - %1$s \"%2$s\" by %3$s and I think you might find it interesting.
%4$s %5$s
--------------
Read on the go for free – download Kindle for Android, iOS, PC, Mac and more %6$s"
Give it a try for free:

"Hi – I'm reading \"%1$s\" by %2$s and wanted to share this quote with you.
\"%3$s\"
Start reading this book for free: %4$s
--------------
Read on the go for free – download Kindle for Android, iOS, PC, Mac and more %5$s"
"You don't have any Audible books in your library. See which of your Kindle books you can listen to with Audible from the More section."
"You don't have any %s to add to a collection."
You have no items downloaded on your device. Switch to the All view to download content
To download books you already own, select Archived Items from the MENU.
To get new books, select Kindle Store from the MENU.
You have no Kindle Unlimited items at this time. Find your next great book to read in the Store tab.
You have no Kindle Unlimited items at this time. Find your next great book to read in the Store tab.
There are no books in your library…
Kindleストアではベストセラーから無料コミックまで、22万冊を超えるセレクションから本をご購入いただけます。
You have no items that match the selected filters. Clear the filters or switch to All view to download items
You do not have any book updates at this moment.
Enjoy unlimited access to over a thousand books, magazines, & more on any device with your Prime membership. Go to the Store tab to browse through Prime Reading titles.
Enjoy unlimited access to over a thousand books, magazines, & more on any device with your Prime membership. Go to the Store tab to browse through Prime Reading titles.
Your recent books, magazines, and comics will appear here. To get started, browse recommended books below or shop the store.
"Something went wrong. Please grant access to the '%s' folder."
You have reached the end of this professional narration sample. To continue listening please add the full professional narration from the Kindle Store.
"New! Automatically let your friends and followers know you've finished."
Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again later or contact customer service.
"Sorry, there was a problem completing your purchase. Please tap 'See in Store' to launch the store and try again."
You’ve reached your borrow limit. To borrow this title, tap here and return at least one of your titles.
Double tap to review this book
Write a review for this book
"Sorry, we've experienced a problem. Please submit your review again."
You have not submitted your review
Headline or summary for your review
An error occurred while posting your rating. Please try again.
"Sorry, we've experienced a problem. Please submit your rating again."
Your rating was posted on Amazon.
Your rating was posted on Amazon & Goodreads.
Your rating was posted on Goodreads.
"Write your review here Consider: Why did you choose this rating? What did you like or dislike? Who would you recommend this product to?"
Thank you for submitting your review on Amazon.
Thank you for submitting your review on Amazon & Goodreads.
Thank you for submitting your review.
Thank you for submitting your review on Goodreads.
View your review for this book
Sorry, something went wrong. Please contact customer service.
Purchased by accident? Tap to cancel your purchase.
Purchased by accident? Tap here to cancel order.
Sorry, we might have a problem with completing your purchase. Please tap to launch the store.
Sorry, we might have a problem with lending your book. Please tap to launch the store.
For your protection a payment verification is required. Please check your email or Message Center for instructions to complete this purchase.
Sorry, we were unable to process your purchase due to an issue with your billing information. Please tap to launch the store and try again.
Sorry, we were unable to process your purchase due to a price increase. Please tap to launch the store and try again.
Grants ownership, but does not perform download nor open
This item could not be opened.
The selected item could not be opened. Please try again. If the problem persists, contact Customer Service at www.amazon.com/kindlesupport.
Unable to download this book because there is not enough storage space. You can free up space on your device by removing content you no longer use.
There was an error downloading the book. Please try again later. If you continue having problems, please contact Kindle Customer Service.

You have reached the maximum number of devices that can read this item. Please deregister devices you no longer use and delete the content, and then try downloading the item again. For help, contact Kindle Customer Service.
The information you entered does not match an Amazon account. Please try again. For help, visit www.amazon.com/devicesupport.
There was an error while registering your Kindle. Please try again later. For help, visit www.amazon.com/devicesupport.
We are unable to register your Kindle. Please try again later. For help, visit www.amazon.com/devicesupport.
There was an error processing your order. Please try again later.
Please check your Wi-Fi or mobile network connection and try again.

You do not have any valid credit cards specified for your Amazon.com user account. You can set up your default credit card online by visiting Amazon.com and clicking on Manage Your Content & Devices from Your Account page.
Please confirm your email address and password and try again.
"Your device doesn't connect to a Wi-Fi network. Do you want to download using mobile data?"
This device is currently set to the year %1$s. Please set it to the current year.
This device has already been registered to another user. Please uninstall and reinstall the Kindle application.
There was a problem downloading this item.
This book cannot be downloaded on this device. Please try reading this book on a Kindle E-reader or with the free Kindle App on a different Android or iOS device.

Your device cannot be registered because another device with the same name is already registered to your account. To resolve this issue, visit the Manage Your Content & Devices page on Amazon.com and change the name(s) of your other registered device(s).
There was an error downloading the font. Please try again later.
There was an error processing your order. Please try again later.
Please remove the item from your device and go to All Items to download it again.
This item has expired. If you have purchased this book, please remove the item from your device and go to Archived Items to download it again.
The free trial for this book has expired. To continue using the book purchase this item in the Kindle Store.
This item is not compatible with this device.

This version of the book is not supported on your device. To get a compatible version, remove the book, go to All Items and then tap the book cover to download it again. If the problem persists, contact Customer Service at www.amazon.com/devicesupport.
Unable to complete your request at this time. Please try again later. If the problem continues, try restarting the application.
There was an error downloading the book. Please try again later. If you continue having problems, please contact Kindle Customer Service.
Could not connect to Amazon. Please try again
There was an error canceling your order. Please contact Kindle Customer Service.
There was an error processing your request.

"Your kindle must be registered to use this feature.
Do you want to register now?"
Unable to connect to Amazon. Please verify the Wi-Fi status and device date and time, then try again. For help, visit www.amazon.com/devicesupport.
Your current device is not supported by Kindle. Please make sure that your device is running an official version of Android from your device’s manufacturer and that your device is fully up to date.
A Wi-Fi network connection is required to view the Kindle Store. Please connect to a Wi-Fi network.
Your Android System WebView is out of date. To continue using the app, tap the button below and update the Android System WebView app from the Google Play store.
This content cannot be downloaded because the file is too large. Please connect to a Wi-Fi network and try again.

You can now download books, magazines and newspapers to your SD Card. Choosing this setting will apply to this item and all future downloads. Items you have previously downloaded will remain on your internal storage. You can change this at any time in Reader Settings.
Download content to your SD Card
Download Books and Periodicals to your SD Card
Save new downloads to your external SD Card.
Finished reading this book on Kindle for Android. Description: %1$s
Finished reading %1$d%% on Kindle for Android. Description: %2$s
Quote shared via Kindle for Android: \"%1$s\"
Shared via Kindle for Android. Description: %1$s

"Hi,
I'm reading %1$s by %2$s and wanted to share this quote with you:
\"%3$s\"
Start reading this story for free: %4$s"
"Turn 'Family Sharing' on to share your Kindle content - eBooks, audiobooks, magazines and more - with members of your family."
You are not sharing this book with anyone
Choose who you share this book with
A required Android resource is not available. Please close and reopen the application to try again. If the problem persists, please reinstall Kindle for Android following the steps outlined %1$s.
Deck title: %s. Double tap to edit
Go to X-Ray or Notebook to create a deck using existing content
Go to Notebook to create a deck using existing content
Use Flashcards to study and ace the important concepts from the book in no time.
Search is not available in Flashcards.
Use Flashcards to review X-Ray terms from the book, study your notes, or create a custom study deck.
"When you send feedback we'll include details about your device to help us improve Kindle for Android."
{0} is a captive portal network. Captive portal networks are not supported. Please choose a different network.

Your Kindle app can connect to other Amazon devices for certain features using Bluetooth. Would you like to enable Location permissions so the app can access Bluetooth? You will still need to make sure Bluetooth and Location are enabled in your OS settings to use this feature.
Kindle requires location permissions to discover and set up certain Amazon devices over Bluetooth.
Use your Kindle app to set up other Amazon devices through Bluetooth. You must have Bluetooth and Location turned on to use this feature. Learn More.
Setup canceled. To detect this Kindle E-reader again, tap \"Retry\". You can also quit and relaunch the app to try again.
The password you entered is incorrect. Please try entering your password again.
The WiFi password saved to your Amazon account may not be current. Please enter the current password to your WiFi network.
By tapping “Link and Continue” you agree to Amazon’s Conditions of Use and all the terms found here. View our Privacy Notice.
Al presionar "Vincular y Continuar" acepta las Condiciones de Uso de Amazon y todos los términos contenidos aquí. Vea nuestro Aviso de Privacidad.
Low power detected. To help prevent issues with Bluetooth, connect to power before continuing.
Make sure your phone does not go to sleep while connecting to your Kindle E-reader
There was a problem connecting to your Kindle. Please move closer to your device and try again.
There was a problem with the connection to your Kindle. Please move closer to the device and try setup again.
Amazon Device Simple Setup is only available for Android 6 (Marshmallow) and higher. To use this feature, please update your device to a newer version of Android.
There was a problem connecting to the internet. Please ensure that your internet is working, and try again.
There was a problem setting up your Kindle. Please try again later. If problem persists please contact customer service.
There was a problem setting up your Kindle. Please try again.
We were unable to connect to your Kindle. Please try again.
You will be signed into this Kindle as {0}{1}.
Your Kindle is now logged in to your Amazon account and Wi-Fi. Switch back to your Kindle to continue.
Sorry, a timeout issue has occurred. Please try again.
We were unable to log in to the network {0} with the information provided.
We were unable to log in to {0} with the information provided. Please try again.
We were unable to register your Kindle. Please try again later. If problem persists please contact customer service.
There was a problem with your document. Send us feedback.
There was a problem with your document. Please click the button below to Contact Us and Give Feedback.
FIND BOOKS YOU WANT TO READ
Nothing selected from which to create flashcards.
Keep downloading will consume Mobile data since no available Wi-Fi network currently, continue?

Your device is currently not registered to an Amazon account. Before you can use this feature, you must log in to your existing Amazon account or create a new one.
Please log in to read this sample.
There is not enough space available on this device.
There is not enough space available on the media card.
"Future Purchases can't be shared with kids by default"
Taking you to the Kindle Store…
%1$s items have been marked as read. Also mark these as read on Goodreads?
%1$s has been marked as read. Also mark this as read on Goodreads?
%1$s items have been marked as unread but are still on your Goodreads profile. Please visit the Goodreads website or app to change this.
%1$s has been marked as unread but is still on your Goodreads profile. Please visit the Goodreads website or app to change this.
An error occurred while updating your Goodreads profile. Please visit the Goodreads website or app to make this change.
To use the Send to Kindle option, Kindle needs permission to access your data storage.
Permission Needed to Access Your Data Storage
This item is grouped in the wrong series.
Does not download nor grant ownership
We do not currently support Audible Immersion Reading with continuous scrolling. Tap “Listen” to continue to the player, or switch to paginated view.
Several experience improvements and bug fixes
"You don't have any notifications right now. Check back soon!"
"Sorry, we've experienced a problem. Please try again."

%3$s
%4$s
"
"The document you're trying to send is empty"
This item is out of order.
Turn on “Show Media” here to read with art, animation and video
Please check your Wi-Fi or mobile network connection and try again.
"We've added some features to this eTextbook to help you study: Notebook, X-Ray, and Flashcards"
"We've added some features to this eTextbook to help you study: Notebook and Flashcards"
Problem installing{CLICK_HERE} to try download again.

We invite you to experience the Kindle reading application designed for your needs as a Chinese customer. Our new application provides features such as one-tap night mode, sharing books with your WeChat and Weibo friends, and WeChat payment. Even more features will be coming in future versions.
Click the button below to install the new version. Please remove the current version manually after installation.
Receive notifications and save up to 80% on top-rated Kindle books.
Kindle Unlimited 电子书订阅服务
Thanks! Your feedback helps us make X-Ray better.
please tell us more about the problem
The content and the term do not match
Tap X-Ray and get a rundown of key terms on the page, chapter, or book.
Open X-Ray to see a list of key terms from the book. Tap on terms to get definitions, videos, and more.

%3$s
%4$s
Information subject to a Creative Commons License, available at %s
No terms found in this section
Search is not available in X-Ray for Textbooks.
The term is found on the following pages (sorted by relevance)
The term is found on the following locations (sorted by relevance)
Turn Popular Highlights on or off in the Aa menu.
Show popular highlights on the page.
To change screen brightness, please allow Kindle to Modify System Settings.
Apply motion when moving from panel-to-panel. Adjust slider left or right to change the speed of transitions.
Applies a black mask around every panel within Guided View.
Applies a masking color that best compliments the gutter space around the panel within Guided View.
Removes masking color around each panel. Neighboring panels will be visible.
Swipe or tap to cinematically shift from panel-to-panel at your own pace.
When entering the start of a new page in Guided View, the full page will be shown. Swipe or tap to continue with Guided View.
When exiting the last panel of the page in Guided View, the full page will be shown. Swipe or tap to continue to the next page.
No settings are available for this content.
Turning off continuous scrolling will also turn off Reading Ruler. Do you want to continue?
To use Reading Ruler in this book, you must also enable Continuous Scrolling. Do you want to do this now?
Add a colored ruler over text to help guide reading.
Opening is taking a little longer than usual - hang tight!
Please try to follow the author again.
See recent updates and enable automatic updates.
Group comics by series in your library.
Sync your reading position, annotations, and more across devices so you never lose your place. Tap for more info.
Enable automatic updates for your books.
See any coupons you have available.
View files on your device inside your library.
Show information about the book when you open it for the first time.
Show the highlight menu when you select a passage of text.
Go to the Aa menu inside a book to find reading settings, including Popular Highlights, Word Wise, and more.
Use a page turn animation while reading.
Display the current time on page.
"Use your phone's volume buttons to turn pages."
Start continuous reading. Press ALT and Enter to start text-to-speech. Press backspace to open or close book menu.
Close and go back to reading
Jump forward since you read the recap
Since you read till the end of recap \"%1$s\", skip to chapter \"%2$s\".
Review key insights from each chapter

"Let's find you a book from our selection of millions of titles and thousands of audiobooks.
As a Prime member, you also get free unlimited access to over a thousand books, magazines and more with Prime Reading!"

You will always have the most up-to-date version of your books with the latest features. Any automatic book updates you receive will preserve your reading progress, notes, highlights and bookmarks so you can pick up from where you left off.
This book does not support Left Alignment and other Enhanced Typography options.
Transfer your current downloads to SD Card to free up %1$s (%2$d titles) on your device. Depending on your library size, it may take a while.
Move existing library to SD Card?
By signing in, you agree to the Kindle License Agreement and Terms of Use.

"You are signing out of your Amazon apps on this device.
This will delete all downloaded content from your device. You can always redownload your Kindle books from your library at any time."
The selected audio content could not be played. Please try downloading the content again.
Playback will pause at end of chapter
%1$s has been marked as read and is not shown in your library
%1$s has been marked as red and is not shown in your library
Finished reading this book on Kindle for Android. Description: %1$s
Finished reading %1$d%% on Kindle for Android. Description: %2$s
Quote shared via Kindle for Android: \"%1$s\"
Shared via Kindle for Android. Description: %1$s
There is an item missing from this series.
Tap on Amazon_App.apk to install the Amazon App for Android.
Scroll to Unknown sources and tap the checkbox.
The item has been queued for download when there is wifi
Using data to download the book, you can change this in settings > change wifi setting menu
Successfully sent your documents to Kindle
You have %1$s items in this series.
You are currently reading at location %1$d.

"<PLACEHOLDER>While Kindle now features Page Flip to help you move through your book more quickly, not all books are able to take advantage of these improvements.
We're working hard to bring support for enhanced navigation to all Kindle books, and plan to update your book when available.</PLACEHOLDER>"
"This book doesn't support Page Flip, but you can still use the progress bar to jump to a new page."
You are currently reading at page %1$s.
You are currently reading at page %1$s, location %2$s.
Please select at least one of your devices.
Please send only one document to Kindle at a time
Your Kindle books can be found under Archive.
No free space on external storage.
"You've reached the end of professional narration for this book. You can continue reading material that was not narrated."
Please check your Wi-Fi or mobile network connection and try again.
Add books so you always have something great to read.
Audio is not supported for this Kindle book.
You are not currently signed in. Please open the Kindle app and register your device before using Send To Kindle.
This feature is not available on this demonstration device.

"Your %1$s exported from %2$s is attached to this email.
Sent from Kindle"
This export will exceed the %1$s%% limit set by the publisher for this book by %2$s%%. New items will not be exported after the limit is reached.
After this export, you will reach %1$s%% of the %2$s%% limit set by the publisher for this book.
No annotations found in the selection range. Please adjust the selection and try again.
To export your Notebook, please install an app that can receive the file such as Google Drive or Gmail from Google Play.

You have exceeded the clipping limit set by the publisher. You can only export highlights from the book that have previously been exported. Your selection included {0} not previously exported. Please change your selection and try again.
You have already used the %1$s%% export limit set by the publisher for this book. You can continue to export Notebook items that were exported already, but new items will not be exported.
To stay below the Notebook export size limit of 5 MB, please export fewer items or do not include images.
Open Notebook to review all your highlights and notes in one place.
Search is not available in Notebook.
Open Notebook to view all your notes, highlights, images, and bookmarks in one place.
Tip: You can swipe left on an individual notification to delete.
This will delete all of your notifications
Push Notifications sent to this device
%1$s - Download unsuccessful. Tap to try again.
Oops! Something went wrong. Tap to refresh.
An error occurred and we were unable to delete the message at this time. Please try again later.
"You don't have an internet connection right now."
Find your next great read by browsing top picks and recommendations below, or shop the store.

Pinyin helps young readers and readers learning Chinese by displaying pronunciation guides for the most challenging characters in the book.

Oops, something went wrong. Please close and re-open the book.
Change narration speed, currently: %1$s times the default speed

Your feedback may be shared with the publisher.
Thank you. A customer support specialist will look into this error.
Full Definition. Double tap to open full definition in dictionary.
Go to dictionary. Double tap to open full definition in dictionary.
%s. Double tap to change current dictionary language.
Over %1$d results found. Add more criteria to narrow your search results.

Switching to text view to show your search results.
Speak your search for this book
Information about this book is collapsed. Double tap or swipe up to expand it
Information about this book is expanded. Double tap or swipe down to collapse it
Rate this book on Amazon and Goodreads.
Rating posted on Amazon and Goodreads.
Thank you! Your rating and review for this book was posted on Goodreads.

Thank you! We’re processing your review. This might take several days, so we appreciate your patience. If you are still unable to see your review on the product page or on your profile page after several days, then we may not have been able to post your review as written. Please read the Amazon Community Guidelines before resubmitting your review.
Thank you! Your rating for this book was posted on Amazon.
Thank you! Your rating for this book was posted on Amazon and Goodreads.
Review this book on Amazon and Goodreads.
"Review (20 words or more required) ‐ What did you like or dislike? ‐ Whom would you recommend this book to? ‐ Why did you choose this rating?"
Find books you want to read
Tap and hold items to rearrange.
"Find exactly what you're looking for in your book and notes."
Shop for best-selling and recommended Kindle books.
Tap to check your wireless settings.
Get recommendations for books by connecting to the Internet.
Samples are not allowed on K-12 school accounts.
Are you sure you wish to remove this item from the collection?

"This collection is synced across all your devices and will be removed on all of them.
Removing a collection does not delete the content stored on your device or in the cloud.
Are you sure you want to remove this collection?"
Your recent items will appear here. You can manage or remove items from this list anytime.
When you return a book, it will be removed from your Kindle. Your notes and highlights will be saved if you borrow this book again in the future.
We were unable to return your book. Please try again.
We are unable to process your request right now. Please try again.
We are unable to load your device list right now. Please try again.
To proceed, please select the device(s) where you want to remove this download.
Oops! You have reached your download limit for \"%1$s\"
If you continue to see this message please visit %1$s to sign out of your unused devices.
Your book is downloaded to the device(s) listed below. To remove the download from these devices, you must remove it locally or deregister the device.
There are no collections in your library.

This permission allows other applications to launch the Kindle Store.
Sorry, there was a problem loading Discover. Try searching in the app or go to the Amazon website to browse and purchase books and magazines.
Sorry, there was a problem loading Discover.
You can browse and purchase books and magazines on the Amazon website or try again later.
Sorry, there was a problem. Try searching or go to the Kindle Storefront.
Sorry, your account does not have access to the Kindle Store.
Kindle store has been blocked. You can unblock store by unblocking Books and Newsstand in parental controls.
Kindle store has been blocked. You can unblock store by unblocking Amazon Stores, Books, and Newsstand in parental controls.
Kindle store has been blocked. You can unblock store by unblocking Amazon Stores in parental controls.
Sorry, there was a problem loading the Kindle Store.

"You are currently at location %1$d. The furthest read location across all your devices is %2$d.

Go to that page?"

"You are currently at location %1$d. The most recent location read across all your devices is %2$d.
Go to that location?"

Go to that page?"

Go to that page?"

"A more recent reading position was found further ahead.
Go to that position?"

"A more recent reading position was found further ahead. This position was read from %1$s at %2$s.
Go to that position?"

"A more recent reading position was found further back.
Go to that position?"

"A more recent reading position was found further back. This position was read from %1$s at %2$s.
Go to that position?"

"You are currently at location %1$d. The most recent location read is %2$d from %3$s at %4$s.
Go to that location?"
You are currently at the most recent read location across all your devices.
You are currently at the furthest read location across all your devices.
Double-tap an article to read in a simple text view.
Color theme changes do not affect your reading experience. To change the color while reading, select the Aa menu in the toolbar from inside a book.
"Displays the current time on the page you're reading."
To access all episodes, you must be connected to the Internet. Please check your WiFi or cellular data network.
Tokens are not available for purchase in this app.
You can purchase Tokens on amazon.com.
Transferring: Book moving to SD card
This book is currently moving to SD card. It cannot be opened until its transfer is complete.
An error occurred. Please try again.
Unsupported Language. Updating your Kindle may resolve this.
Your device must be registered to use this feature.
No network detected. Please check your connection and try again.
Audio playback will require an additional download.

"Your Kindle is unable to establish a wireless connection.
Do you want to turn Airplane Mode off?"
to see a lightbox view of the magazine
to see the content of the magazine

Never miss an issue. Start a 30-day FREE trial.
You have already purchased this book.
There was a problem canceling your purchase. Please contact Amazon Customer Service by going to Settings and selecting Help.
Thank you! Purchased by accident? [[Cancel order]]
There was a problem processing your payment. Please verify your [[Payment Settings]]
Please go to [[Manage Your Content & Devices]] for more information.
There was a problem processing your payment. [[Verify your payment info.]]
There was a problem processing your payment.
Sorry, we were unable to process your purchase due to an issue with your billing information. [[Please tap to launch the store and try again]]
There was a problem with your billing information. [[Try again in the store.]]
Sorry, we might have a problem with completing your purchase. [[Please tap to launch the store]]
Your bank requires payment verification. We sent you an email to complete this purchase.
Your purchase may have failed. [[Please confirm here.]]
Sorry, we were unable to process your purchase due to a price increase. [[Please tap to launch the store and try again]]
The price has increased. [[Go to the store to complete your purchase.]]
You can repurchase this title in a few minutes.
Your order was canceled. You can repurchase this title in a few minutes. [[Learn more]]
You are now reading the full book.
Audible Customer Care is here to help. Call us anytime on 1800 736-910 (Australia Toll Free) or +61 3 9034 3784 (International).
Audible Customer Care is here to help. Call us anytime on 0800 58900 73 (DE free phone) or +49 (0) 89 22061058 (International).
Audible Customer Care is here to help. Call us anytime on 0800 496 2455 (UK Free phone) or + 44 (0) 203 356 6218 (International).
Audible Customer Care is here to help. Call us anytime at 1-888-283-5051 (USA & Canada) or 1-973-820-0400 (International).
There was an error with your purchase. [[Please try again.]]
Never miss an issue. Start a 30-day FREE trial.
Jump back %1$s seconds in the text.
Pick any 3 issues - no subscription required.
Still having trouble? Call Audible Customer Care %1$s
There was an error with your purchase |
Thank you for your Audible purchase

string.name: use_a_different_account

resources.string: Use volume buttons to turn pages.
There was a problem loading the Kindle Store. Please try again later.
"In a few easy steps, we'll help you get personalized recommendations and find your first book."
By signing in or creating an account, you agree to the {KTOS}.
Carousel displays recent items on the Kindle app Home screen.
Navigation panel organizes content for quick access to your Books, Documents, and Newsstand periodicals.
Browse all your items in the Cloud or just the content downloaded on your Android device.
Explore and download popular samples in the Kindle Store.

"Whispersync for books uses data from this device to keep your Kindle apps in sync, back up your annotations, and provide other features. If you turn off Whispersync for this device, this device will not send such usage data to Amazon's servers, and some features will be unavailable to you, including syncing your reading location from this device across other devices."
Thank you. Can you tell us more about the problem?
Which of these is most helpful?
"Thank you. We won't show you hints for this word again."

"Some words have more than one possible meaning. When we're unsure of the correct meaning of a word in a given sentence, we'll show you a list of possible meanings and ask you to pick the one that is most helpful."
"Thank you. We'll give this word some additional review to find the best hint."
Word Wise helps young readers and people learning English read harder books by providing hints for the most challenging words in the book.
Word Wise helps readers learning English by providing hints for the most challenging words in the book.
Word Wise has been helping young readers and readers learning English read harder books by providing hints for challenging words. We now support hints in Chinese!
Would you like to turn Word Wise on for all compatible books?
You can turn off Word Wise by tapping on Menu and choosing Word Wise.
Would you like to try the Chinese hints?
Word Wise Now Supports Chinese Hints
Tap on a word with a hint to see a definition, similar words, and more.
Set the language for your Word Wise hints.
Word Wise has moved to Aa Menu
"When we're unsure of the correct hint for a word, we'll show you a list of possible meanings and ask you to pick the one that is most helpful."
Show hints above challenging words when available
Show easy hints above unfamiliar words when available.
Tap on Word Wise to hide the hints or to use the slider to adjust how many hints you see
There was an error downloading Word Wise for this book. Would you like to try downloading again?
Could not send feedback. Please try again later.
Please tell us what we can improve.
Sorting alphabetical. Change by double tapping
Sorting by relevance. Change by double tapping
Additional clips beyond your furthest page read are hidden. Tap to show all clips.
Clips beyond your furthest page read are hidden. Tap to show all clips.

"You have not made any notes, highlights, or bookmarks.
Press and hold on book text or an image to create a note or highlight.
Tap the top right corner of a book page to create bookmark."
Double tap any article to read it in a simple text view. The Kindle app does not support page zoom on this device.
